generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures swinging motion of hoist for real-time environmental data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors wind speed for real-time environmental data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data including swing angle and wind speed stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization of lab scale gantry crane structure and puck movement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler
]

instance HorizontalCartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor managing horizontal cart movement along gantry rail"
]

instance VerticalHoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor managing vertical hoist operation"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet mounted on hoist end-effector for container pickup and placement"
]

instance PythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language for application development"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerized deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control service for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides MoveHorizontalCartAction, MoveVerticalHoistAction, ActivateElectromagnetAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for system performance tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service to ensure synchronization between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfidenceBoundsInsight, NotifyOperatorAction
]

instance ConfidenceBoundsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confidence bounds derived from simulation models for decision-making"
]

instance NotifyOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notification to operators to take action based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MoveHorizontalCartAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action for controlling horizontal cart movement"
]

instance MoveVerticalHoistAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action for controlling vertical hoist operation"
]

instance ActivateElectromagnetAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action for controlling electromagnetic force for container pickup"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for system performance tracking"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard for real-time visualization of crane operation"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program capturing physical crane data and transmitting via MQTT"
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system operating in controlled laboratory environment for research"
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory environment for research in digital twin applications"
    base:contains LabScaleGantryCraneSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends movement trajectory commands to the Physical Crane Interface via MQTT. Specific command types, message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution procedures, and command execution confirmation details are not described in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model [5], comprising components such as a Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, and an MQTT Broker for signaling between services. The context and container diagrams detail the system's structure and coordination mechanisms."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements against simulation results using distance metrics, with thresholds for acceptable deviations to trigger error correction and maintain model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is used for inter-service communication between containers, with an MQTT Broker facilitating signaling. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The software is deployed on a personal computer with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. A Docker Compose file is provided to orchestrate the startup and shutdown of these containers."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Lab Scale Gantry Crane system implements the C4 Model standard for architecture visualization, as described in context and container diagrams to structure the system's software components and their relationships."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Continuous Validation Service compares real-time trajectory measurements against simulated trajectories, calculates distance metrics against an acceptable threshold, and notifies operators via the Grafana dashboard when deviations exceed the threshold to ensure operational safety."
]
